title: She Had to Say Yes
writer: John Francis Larkin, Rian James, Don Mullaly
actors: Loretta Young, Winnie Lightner, Lyle Talbot
plot: In the depth of the Depression, Sol Glass has the idea that the girls in the stenographic department should be used to entertain the clients. It seems that the clients are tiring of the regular hard-and-fast women, and this would ...
